test.command: bun test --max-concurrency=6 apps/dashboard/src apps/api/src packages/api/src packages/auth/src packages/db/src packages/env/src

typecheck.command: bun run check-types && bun x tsc -p apps/dashboard/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bun x tsc -p packages/api/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bun x tsc -p packages/auth/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bun x tsc -p packages/db/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bun x tsc -p packages/env/tsconfig.json --noEmit

lint.command: bun x ultracite check apps/dashboard/src apps/api/src packages/api/src packages/auth/src packages/db/src packages/env/src

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the existing UI-package wrapper pattern for Base UI primitives so Midday-clone selector work knows when to add shared `packages/ui` wrappers instead of inventing app-local substitutes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `onboarding-midday-selector-parity` review found the feature had to add `packages/ui/src/components/select.tsx` to follow an existing wrapper pattern already visible in `packages/ui/src/components/dropdown-menu.tsx`, but the skill currently gives no guidance about that pattern.

rejectedObservations.observation: The `dashboard-parity-worker` handoff again marked `followedProcedure: true` even though the transcript skeleton did not show the required `midday-reference` invocation.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented by earlier auth-shell-parity scrutiny rounds under skill compliance reporting; this review adds more evidence but not a meaningfully different remediation
